# Data

Database design, SQL, migrations, and data modeling.

## Skills (3)

| Skill | Tags | Description |

| [`data-modeling`](./data-modeling/SKILL.md) | `data-modeling`, `database`, `schema`, `er-diagram`, `normalization` | Data modeling fundamentals — entity-relationship design, normalization forms, modeling patterns (polymorphism, hierarchy, audit trails), and mapping domain models to database schemas. Use this skill when designing a new data model or refactoring an existing one. |
| [`database-migrations`](./database-migrations/SKILL.md) | `database`, `migration`, `schema`, `postgresql`, `devops` | Database migration best practices — schema evolution, rollback strategy, zero-downtime migrations, migration tooling, and common pitfalls. Use this skill when adding/modifying tables or columns in a production database. |
| [`sql-fundamentals`](./sql-fundamentals/SKILL.md) | `sql`, `database`, `postgresql`, `schema`, `query-optimization` | SQL fundamentals for developers — schema design, indexing strategy, query optimization, JOINs, transactions, and common anti-patterns. Use this skill when designing a database schema, optimizing slow queries, or reviewing data access patterns. Dialect-agnostic with PostgreSQL examples. |
